{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Monarch viewing platform
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Northstrider]]'s [[Monarch viewing platform]] is a ball of dark, floating water.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Monarch viewing platform]] is a floating location.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
